summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Corgi All Commodities 2x Daily ETF (XCOM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad market commodities. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of the Invesco Optimum Yield Diversified Commodity Strategy No K-1 ETF (NASDAQ: PDBC), which provides diversified commodity exposure.
